title: malachra ruderalis
intro: Malachra ruderalis, also known as the "wild mallow," is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malachra ruderalis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
